title: Complete the v0.0.3 operational audit correction program
description: Milestone record for the correction program derived from hands-on Waystation v0.0.3 and DuckBrain migration feedback. The program fixes lifecycle/readiness integrity, cross-worktree coordination boundaries, missing mutation APIs, issue data loss, misleading missing-ledger behavior, semantic validation gaps, and derived-output ergonomics while preserving local-first JSON and the single core write path.
acceptance: All dependent implementation and release tasks are done with recorded commits and verification results.
Every confirmed defect in the operational feedback is fixed or has a documented, evidence-backed decision explaining why behavior remains unchanged.
Waystation's own ledger, generated reports, documentation, binary, and graph agree on the released behavior.
A fresh agent can use task next, claim, lifecycle mutations, shared-root selection, sync, validate, and briefs without relying on tribal knowledge or direct canonical JSON edits.
notes: Umbrella milestone only. The actionable work is decomposed into the task-audit-* dependencies. This Waystation ledger replaces the mistakenly introduced OpenSpec plan; OpenSpec is not a project dependency or source of truth.
